compiled_state.title: record-test-status.sh: worktree CWD -> silent no-op (test gate never recorded)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview

record-test-status.sh fails when invoked from a worktree CWD (e.g., called with bash -x from a worktree session). The script becomes confused by the worktree path context and does not correctly resolve the repo root or test-gate-status file location. 

Observed behavior on a host project:
- Script invoked as: bash -x "$HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/digital-service-orchestra/plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh" --source-file src/app/lib/__tests__/migrate.test.ts
- Script sourced deps.sh, fuzzy-match.sh, red-zone.sh successfully, then produced no output (silent failure)
- Workaround attempted: direct write to test-gate-status was blocked by bypass-sentinel pre-bash hook
- Workaround attempted: cd into main repo blocked by CLAUDE.md rule 11 (cd into main repo from worktree session)
- Final workaround: agent reset CWD to /tmp to allow subsequent calls to work — fragile and unreliable

Root symptom: script runs with worktree CWD but resolves REPO_ROOT or test-gate-status path incorrectly, producing no output and exit 0 (silent no-op).

## Environment

- Host project: parity-scan
- Worktree path: /Users/joeoakhart/parity-scan/.claude/worktrees/agent-af7fe368
- Plugin cache: $HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/digital-service-orchestra/plugins/dso/
